system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Emma Kim. I’d like to cancel my reservation—EHGLP3. I know it’s been a little over 24 hours since I booked, but I was out of town and couldn’t get to it sooner. Can you help me with the cancellation?

Thank you for providing your reservation ID and details. To proceed with your cancellation request, I need to confirm a few things:

1. Has any portion of your flight in reservation EHGLP3 already been flown?
2. Can you specify the reason for cancellation (change of plan, airline cancelled flight, or other reasons)?

If no part of your flight has been flown and your reason meets the airline’s cancellation policy, I can assist you. Please confirm these details so I can proceed.

Sure, I haven’t flown any part of the reservation yet—the trip hasn’t started. The reason for cancellation is a change of plans. Please let me know if I’m eligible for a refund before you process anything, as I don’t want to cancel if I won’t get my money back.

Thank you for confirming the details. Based on airline policy, a refund is only available for cancellations in the following cases:
- Booking was made within the last 24 hours
- The flight is cancelled by the airline
- It is a business class reservation
- You have travel insurance and the reason is covered (health or weather)

Since your booking was made over 24 hours ago and your reason is a change of plans, you would only be eligible for a refund if your reservation is in business class or you have travel insurance. 

Would you like me to check if your reservation is in business class or includes travel insurance before proceeding?

Yes, please check if my reservation is in business class or if I have travel insurance included. When I booked my previous trip through your agency, I had insurance, and I was told I didn’t need to get it again this time because it would be the same process. Can you confirm for me? I really don’t want to lose the full amount if it’s possible to get a refund.

I am currently unable to access your reservation details to confirm whether your booking is in business class or includes travel insurance. Without this information, I cannot accurately determine your eligibility for a refund.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent who can access your reservation details and assist you further?

Yes, please transfer me to a human agent who can look up my reservation and confirm if I have business class or travel insurance. I really want to make sure I won’t lose my money before making any changes. Thank you!

arguments.summary: Emma Kim requests to cancel reservation EHGLP3. She needs confirmation if her booking is in business class or includes travel insurance to determine refund eligibility before proceeding with cancellation.

messages.content:
YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

A human agent will assist you shortly and confirm your reservation details regarding business class and travel insurance. Thank you for your patience.

arguments.summary: Emma Kim requests to cancel reservation EHGLP3. She needs confirmation if her booking is in business class or includes travel insurance to determine refund eligibility before proceeding with cancellation.

final_response:
